projectName: Curly sherpa teddy gold organza bow
description: Curly sherpa teddy gold organza bow — sewing and cleaning.
itemDetails:
This curly sherpa teddy with gold organza bow is a formal gift-bear style commonly sold for celebration occasions such as anniversaries and baby gifts. Curly sherpa textures and decorative bow trims became especially common in 2000s-present plush lines.

Typical materials include polyester sherpa outer fabric, polyester fill, and lightweight organza or satin ribbon accessories.
